NewsAgent.rationale: Product launch and supplier upgrade outweigh a single China downgrade.

MacroAgent.rationale: Mixed signals: steady Fed but higher yields and a risk-off geopolitical tone.

TechnicalAgent.rationale: Price above MA20/MA50 with positive MACD; RSI not yet overbought.

MemoryAgent.lesson: Launch-driven optimism has historically held for ~1 week absent macro shocks.

DebateAgent.bull_case: Demand signals plus technical confirmation support a long.
DebateAgent.bear_case: Elevated macro risk and China demand questions could cap upside.

PositionManager.new_thesis: Launch-driven demand + technical confirmation; exit if macro turns risk_off.
PositionManager.reason: Conviction above tau_enter and no active risk veto.
